name: Pesto Pasta and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 each Leeks, halved lengthwise and sliced (3 cups)
1/2 cup Drained, marinated sun-dried tomatoes (from 8 oz jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the sun-dried tomatoes. Meanwhile, cook pasta to desired doneness as directed on package; drain. Keep warm.
2. Heat olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add leeks; cook and stir until tender. Reduce heat to medium; stir in tomatoes and olives.
3. Add pasta to skillet. Cook over medium heat until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally. Add eggs and pesto; cook and stir 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Remove from heat; sprinkle with cheese.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
550 Calories, 27 g Fat, 450 mg Sodium
